title: BiC Permanent Marker, Black
description: Product Description Permanent marker Pocket 1445 Con Black - An exclusive product by Bic. A variety of high quality products, meeting your particular requirements at the office or at home. Ingredients Corn flour (57%), sunflower oil with high oleic content, seasoning to the taste of cheese (vegetarian milk), lactose (milk), vegetarian cheese powder (milk), salt, yeast extract, flavouring, dye (paprika extract)), emulsifier (mono and diglycerides of fatty acids – vegetable) Safety Warning Attention: This bag could cause suffocation, keep away from babies, children and pets.
